plugins.name: signalk-plugin
plugins.description: Author and publish a SignalK server plugin — the @signalk/server-api patterns that work (resource provider vs router, deltas, position), the npm scaffold, and OIDC trusted publishing.

plugins.name: signalk-registry
plugins.description: Preview your expected SignalK registry score before publishing — screenshots, changelog, and audit gaps that cost points, with the score you'd likely receive.

plugins.name: npm-oidc-publish
plugins.description: Publish an npm package from GitHub Actions via OIDC trusted publishing — no NPM_TOKEN, no OTP in CI; the new-package first-publish flow and the registry-propagation 404 gotcha.

plugins.name: debug-mcp-agent
plugins.description: Debug an MCP / tool-backed AI agent: probe ground truth before trusting the agent's account of itself (404-vs-error, which-model, server-down vs missing-data, auth-vs-absence).
